inputs.label: Wall Height
inputs.businessContext: Vertical height of the retaining wall from base to top.

businessContext_i18n.en: Vertical height of the retaining wall from base to top.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstinat duvarının tabandan tepeye dikey yüksekliği.
businessContext_i18n.de: Vertikale Höhe der Stützmauer von der Basis bis zur Krone.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Hauteur verticale du mur de soutènement de la base au sommet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Altura vertical del muro de contención desde la base hasta la parte superior.

inputs.label: Soil Unit Weight
inputs.businessContext: Unit weight of the backfill soil.

businessContext_i18n.en: Unit weight of the backfill soil.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Poids unitaire du sol de remblai.
businessContext_i18n.es: Peso unitario del suelo de relleno.

inputs.label: Friction Angle
inputs.businessContext: Internal friction angle of the soil.

businessContext_i18n.en: Internal friction angle of the soil.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Angle de frottement interne du sol.
businessContext_i18n.es: Ángulo de fricción interna del suelo.

inputs.label: Cohesion
inputs.businessContext: Cohesion of the soil. Enter 0 for granular soils.

businessContext_i18n.en: Cohesion of the soil. Enter 0 for granular soils.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Zeminin kohezyonu. Granüler zeminler için 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Kohäsion des Bodens. Bei rolligen Böden 0 eingeben.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Cohésion du sol. Entrez 0 pour les sols granulaires.
businessContext_i18n.es: Cohesión del suelo. Ingrese 0 para suelos granulares.

inputs.label: Surcharge Load
inputs.businessContext: Uniform surcharge load applied on the backfill surface.

businessContext_i18n.en: Uniform surcharge load applied on the backfill surface.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dolgu yüzeyine uygulanan düzgün yayılı sürşarj yükü.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Charge de surcharge uniforme appliquée sur la surface du remblai.
businessContext_i18n.es: Carga de sobrecarga uniforme aplicada sobre la superficie del relleno.
